recommendations: shell_tool_preference_violations: No new recommendation — flagged 35+ consecutive cycles with no trajectory change; this is structural fixture behavior. Prior recommendations stand; deprioritize unless a new sub-variant emerges.

The cli-gating hook's pipe-as-alternation-delimiter pattern is a known systemic false-positive for rg commands with alternation. The gate_cli_actions.py fix applied in 781e356c-21 should reduce recurrence — verify in next cycle whether self-repair eliminated this or just changed the trigger surface.
